1.title: Handled connections
1.query:
timeseries handled = avg(dt.runtime.nginx.connections.handled),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(handled) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Waiting connections
2.query:
timeseries waiting = avg(dt.runtime.nginx.connections.waiting),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(waiting) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Dropped connections
3.query:
timeseries dropped = avg(dt.runtime.nginx.connections.dropped),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(dropped) desc
| limit 20

4.title: Reading connections

8.title: Maximum worker threads

| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)

9.title: Requests
9.query:
timeseries requests = avg(dt.runtime.nginx.requests),

| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)

11.title: Socket backlog waiting time
11.query:
timeseries socket_waiting_time = avg(dt.runtime.iis.connections.socket_waiting_time),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)

| limit 20
